med//_gsal la rtog pa med pa ste//_dper na bar snang 'ja' dang 'dra//_sra ni 'od kyi su yin te//_thugs ni skyed la stong chos su de//_gnyis med rto bral chen po yin//_sgra dang thugs gnyis 'dus pa las//_rtsal ni mi 'gag bdag nyid kyi//_gdul bya gang dang mos phyogs su//_gang la gang 'dod 'byung ba de//_sprul ba'i sku yi gnas lugs yin//_dpe ni sgyu ma mkhan po yos//_rdzas dang kyi rten 'grol kyis//_ltas mo'i mi yi mig snga ru//_gang 'dod gzugs pa yod pa 'dra//_de bzhin dpe ni su ma yi//_gzugs brtan sna tshogs sdang ba 'dra//_chos sgra'i rtsal ma 'gags pa yis//_gzugs su gnyis su snang ba'o//_rig pa'i cha nas chos kyi sku//_de gsal ga gyis grub//_chos kyi sgra las gzugs su gnyis//_rtsal lam shugs las byung ba'o//_de'i phyir chos sku sprod pas//_gzugs sku gnyis po shugs la 'phrod//_gong bzhin chos sku'i gnas lugs de//_ye nas bdag gi rang bzhin yin//_de dag rang la ros bar ste//_ngo bo rang gis mamang dzin//_dzad ga dmas car bzung nas//_dam la shes pa 'di nyid pa//_thab yin//_na ga ye shes ma shar bas//_stong ba btang rnams canas ni//_myal nyon mongs ni btsam//_de la zhig nas zhes su bstan pa yin//_gang gagan tad ngas brdu ga/_gsal cha brtan pa ste/_lhag mthong rig pa chos sku yin//_gsal cha gong 'og kun tu ni//_shin tu zhib par bstan pa ste//_stong pa'i cha dang gsal ba'i cha//_gsal ba rang gsal dag dang ni//_'grus pas sgo lnga yul lags la//_rjes su mi 'dzin //_matogs blol tshad mar spang mod kyi//_sdang la rang bzhin med de ye shes gdangs su gsal//_dper na mkha' la 'ang tshon gsal ba yang //_mkha' las logs na med kyang logs par ldang //_mkha' yi dang du 'phyo//_gang bgatogs ldan lam lugs kyis//_'bral snang 'dil de bzhin gyur//_thams cad nga nyi rtogs pas krol//_rang sa bzhag pas sbyangs zin//_zhes gsungs sa//_gos nang don gsal gyi rgyud chen po bar shar//_ra narang byung dgas na /_gsal rtsal 'od gdangs shar ba'o//_deyi gong na gzhan med chen po yin//_lta ba'i mtshan nyid ye shes lnga ldan yin//_rang byang rig pa chos su de la ni//_ngo bo ma dag/_rtag mtha' dag la chan mtha' dag/_yod mtha' dkang med mtha' dang //_sdang mtha' dag la stod mtha' dag //_gcig mtha' dag laja ma dag/_mtha' rnams thams cad dag pa na//_lta ba rnam dag chen pa yan//_chen po zhes nas phyir bya//_rnamadag don la spun grub pas//_dag pa chen pa zhes bya'o//_lta ba ldan grub bstan pa ni//_sgron rnams dag das yon tan kyis grub//_de yang sku gsum ye shes rnam pa lnga//_lhan gyis grub pas thams cad rdzogs pa yin//_blta ba lhun grub chen po yin//_dper na bsam 'phel nor bu la//_dgos 'dod thams cad 'byung ba 'dra//_skyon rnams dag pas chad du spangs pa ma yin te//_rang gi ngo bo rtogs pas skyon rnam dag/_dper na nyi ma shar bas mun pa mi gnas bzhin//_yon tan thams cad lhun gyis grub pa ni//_bsrubs pas grub pa ma yin te//_rang ngo rtogs pas thams cad mkhyen par 'char//_dper na rin chen rnyed pas dgos na sa lan chen po 'dra//_thams cad 'byung bas sa gzhi chen po 'dra//_nyon mongs sdig sgrib bsreg pas me dang 'dra//_mi gtsang ldan ljin 'khru bas rgyu dang 'dra//_gang la thogs pa med pas rlung dang 'dra//_ngo bo ma grub par snang stong pa 'dra//_gsal la mi 'gag nyi ma'i zer dang 'dra//_gsal la mi rtog me long man shel rkyen 'phrad 'dra//_bde la mi rtog rtsal mi 'gags pa//_rgya mtsho chen po dag las rlabs 'char 'dra//_'od gdangs lhan grub man shel rkyen 'phrad 'dra//_nyon mongs rang grol sbrul gyi mdud pa 'dra//_tog pa rang ngo rang gis shes pa ni//_rgyal bu dmangs nas rgyal sar bton pa 'dra//_dus gsum 'gyur brgyad pas rten canags dang dra//_nang dugs pangs pasan mang ma 'dra//_gcigags kyil sa rna ma bas na//_da dgas sul ra gdang /_rnam pad nga mtshan pa//_ga sa rang rig rtogs pas ma rig sel ba ni//_sron me bteg pas mun pa sel ba 'dra//_phar la 'joms shing rtsor la mi tshugs pas//_mi 'gyur mi shigs rdo rje pha lam 'dra//_ngo bo 'dus ma byas pas nam mkha' 'dra//_rang rig don rtogs nyon mongs dag pa ni//_ma shar bas thams cad gsal ba 'dra//_ma bsgom gas la rtsal byad dang me long 'dra//_ma bcos ma bslad dang reg gnyug ma 'dra//_mtshon dpe sum chu tham pas lta ba'i don gyi phyogs mtshon//_lnga bablo dang 'thas pa'i yul las 'das pas na//_'di yin dag kho na zhes su bstan pa shin tu dka'//_don gyi zur tsam phyogs tsam mtshon pa yin//_gtan tshigs mang bar bstan kyang gsum yin te//_lung gis gtan la phab pa'i gtan tshigs dang //_man ngag dag gi gtan tshigs bstan pa dang //_de gnyis 'joms pa'i rjes su rigs pa'i gtan tshogs so//_lung gi gtan tshigs rdo rje 'chang gi bka'//_man ngag gtan tshigs bka' lung bcud kyi don//_rig pa'i gtan tshigs rang reg mngon sum don//_lung dang man ngag gnyis kyis ngo sprad pa'o//_lha don rang rig mngon sum rtogs pa'i tshe/_ro sprod shes pas rang ngo zhes pa ste//_nyams su myong bas rang las 'byung ba'i don//_nyon mongs dug lnga la sogs dang grol du//_'dod pa'i yon tan lnga la ma zhen dang //_nyams togs thams cad rang las 'thung ba dang //_dus gsum dag tu 'gyur ba med pa yis//_bar du gcod pa'i bdud kyis tshwag mi 'gyur//_nang gi rig pa chos kyi sU ru togs//_gsal stong gnyis med spos dang bral ba'i gdengs//_bar gyi rtsal ni 'gyu ba 'ang mar dgrol//_rig bzang thal ci spyod ye shes so//_phyi yi ldang ba 'di sdug rang sa dkrol//_ma bcos stong nyid ca rnas gapa//_dag pa bstan pas rgyan rnams thams cad thal//_de ltar shes na lta btogs par byed//_ltab martags pa skyon brtan pa//_dpar na byam 'ar la ma 'anga' bu 'dra//_byam nyal nus su'angs 'ang ga' ltar//_yang dang rtanas lam zhugs pas//_gnas skabs tsam las mthar thug 'bras bu med//_da phyir lta ba ma rtogs sangs mi rgyu//_lta ba'i ngos 'dzin do sprod skabs na gsal//_ngo yis zin na 'phral du rtogs pa 'char//_ci phyir zhen pa dpyad pa de dag ni//_yid la bzung ba'i cha nas nyon mongs yid//_'dzin med rig pa gsal ba lta ba yin//_don la rig pa'i rtsa la ni ma 'gags pas//_ma shes yul la gzung bas rtog pa'i tshogs su ni bzlog pa yin//_lta ba'i la cwo spos dang bral ba yin//_ci phyir spos dang bral zhe na//_spros pa'i mtha' ni mthar skye//_de dang thal na snyos thal lo//_mtha' rung 'bor ba'i mtha'i yin na//_'khor ba'i mtha' yang phyi nang gnyis yin te//_kye yi 'brung langs pa'i mtha'//_'thung ba lda ni 'das byas te//_'dus ma bus shing 'dzin pa med pas mtha' pas grol/_nang mongs dug lnga 'dzin pa'i 'dra/_med du bden pa gcig kyang med//_ming tsam 'di zhes bstan pa ni//_rdo rje sems dpas mtshon du med//_snang ba yod med 'khrul ma 'khrul//_'khrul na 'khrul pa bden na mardzun//_bden na 'khrul pa su //_dngos por 'dod pa blo phugs can//_blo zhugs gang ltar byas kyang 'khrul//_blo zhugs gdi ba cig skal ldan bu//_dge dang sdig pa ye nas mnyam//_ci phyir blo zhugs grol phyir ro//_blo bzang dge bas //_srung yang shUl la 'gyur ba med//_de bzhin dbyung ba la/_gzung 'dzin rten sas sa drug 'byung //_'khrul pa'ang ma cir yang sdung //_sdang yang ga zhil 'gyung brjo //_de yang 'dus pa'i sa nyon//_gse pa'i thams cis kyang byab 'dadong //_dpe na nyima'i stor pol//_sprin dgang dag gti ga /_deb nang bskal bted dus gang zag kun gyis rlong por bzung //_de byer lam chi gegs su gsungs//_dA yang dri rje 'arnabs//_krol bzlas pas bangs dgol//_dkyi nga gcos pa ne//_sems cigazi ni sa nan//_thabs ga la 'ang na pa med//_dpyid ma na tung bar rdzog//_dayang 'dras par rnyeng bton//_chen gadreg pa'i ga pa ma dpos tu thonas//_'bras thams dazhen pas /_ma thob ba da /_sa kyi gtan pa gamu/_tugs sgom pa rgyal pa ra//_mamatshom pa ldan sa da/_tshul sa yid padadran pa shu shA sa//_da yang 'dus pa'i snying zhon//_sangs rgyas nyid du 'gro ba yi//_nges pa'i lam ni gang yin hU~Mr//_thog mar blta ba'i gdangs dang na//_ting 'dzin gyud la mangs gcig bya//_rang byung snying po'i dan/_gas phyir//_brjod pa'i tha stan kun dang zar//_thig pa shes dang sangs rgyas dus mnyam gyir//_de las lhag pa'i chos gzhan med//_da yang de sems dpa' nyon/_khyod ni theg pa 'og ma pa//_bye ma las ni mar btsor bzhin//_bes po 'byung ba rnam pazhi las//_sangs cas 'dod pa'i snying dral bran//_par btu kyang 'thab paspyod//_bar pa sams pan//_thalta pa tho gyur pa da //_sanas parjog ya thAs/_thung thug na//_dgas ldan pas dag 'dang //_bgan nga/_na dmam par spangs pa bzhin//_drin tsam kyis thos phyogs pa//_ci byed nas brtsam ma dgos//_de myi ma brjod pa mim//_dpe den nor ba rin men bzhin/_rtogs pa cim sachog pa'i tshor//_bdag gzhan ga ni skang kyis 'grub/_phyi dpa na yang na/_de yang ni sems dpa' na//_khyeng pagacag pa 'ogs //_dab na til 'i mar ma bang //_mamatshar bar dramar mi byung //_de bzhin dang bya yang ma kyang //_ma dan pa du shes kyi med/_bkang pa 'jam ga bskyes byar//_'dres byas chos tho bas par ngas cas 'byung med//_da'adu 'angs pa snye nas/_dedag ste da las mang yang /_rang ma ma pa shesan//_nim la dzi mamed da ga //_dag brjo na sa pas/_thug pa pa skye badrug sa/_na numamam pa'i'iste/_'drim pa 'ab ba nagangs rgya/_bde na nam them la sa//_'dadapa 'tshig gis 'din na nan//_marin pa ni pa ci shi //_thal sems panis gargyas ni gtug nga bye da/_la du yod dpa /_nis sa rgyas med par byung //_kyims pasha ngan mo'o//_des nam na pasan //_'dum pa'i la ba ma ba d+hAs d+ha//_sems ca can lugs ma 'don//_marig sa shes su lu su su /_sa /_sa sa su de yang 'dus pa dang bzhin//_de la phral ma 'dzin pan//_bgal nyal ba'i mnA thung //_dpyi dang la nga gas bsgribs//_lhan gas pa ma dab/_rtswas rgya gas dal tha//_rgyud gadzang gyur ba na//_nam thag tu 'angan pas brtags//_dganam ma dang /_zhen 'dzin cing //_de mthag pa'i rkyen zhes bya//_rgyu dang de ma thag pa yi//_rkyen gnyis brang du 'jom pa'i phyir//_lhan cig skyes pa'i ma rig yin//_da yang 'dras pa'i snying po nyon//_des bskyed shes pa mngal du 'jug/_ngar 'dzin chags sdang phram ze//_nang gi bzung bkun tu brtas//_de phyir dmigs pa'i rkyen zhes bya//_khong nas byung nas phyi rol gyi//_bag chags yul gyi sdang ba la//_rang gi yid kyi ngan tog zhugs//_yul la chos brgyad kun tu btags//_nga bdag dan tog 'dzin bltas zhen//_mngon rgya chags sdang 'tshar phyis dmigs pa bdag po'i rkyen gnyis tshang //_kun brtags ma rig pa zhes bya//_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_lhan cig kun btags gnyis 'jom pas//_kun gzhi'i rnam par shes pa yin//_des bskyed tshogs brgyad kha tshang bas//_'khor bar 'khyams zhes de la gya//_da yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyan//_sangs rgyas kun gyi ye shes ni//_rang sems rab rtogs pas byung //_yang na dang byung kun cigazhi//_shes nas lung ldan nges padzi don//_zung du 'jom kyir ye shes yin//_sman dang sman pa 'jom pa 'dra//_rdzogs pa chen po nges don 'ja pa las/_ma rig pa dang ye shes dbye ba bstan pa'i le'u ste bcu bdun pa'o//_//_de nas kun reg rgyal po yis//_yul sems dbye ba bka' stsal pa//_sna zhing srid pa'i chos rnams kun//_'khrul sems bag zugs btas pa'i phyir//_snang bzhen pa sna tshogs pa//_bo yul du grub pa med//_de phyir snang ba log 'khrul yin//_da yang 'dres pa'i snying po nyon//_rang gi sems ni 'khrul pa'i dpe//_thag sbrul po yor mi bzhin du//_med la yod 'dzin kun tu brtags//_sa chu me rlung 'byung ba bzhi//_'khrul pa'i bag chags brtas pa phyir//_dngos su snang yang don du med//_de yul 'di ni gtan med la//_rmongs pa kun gyis dam par 'dzin//_lag pa'i rjes su 'brang bas ltung //_smre 'dra'i lung gis bslad pa yin//_da yang rdo rje sems dpa' nyon//_rang rig chos sgra ya shes la//_ma rig rgyan bzhis ma bskyed pas//_kun gzhi med phyir sems kyang med//_yul sems gnyis ka gzhi la med//_de phyir sems min chos srul//_rang rig ye shes blo ldan pas//_snang ba med phyir 'dzin pa bral//_gsal la 'dzin med mi g.yo ba//_sangs rgyas kun gyi dgongs par bshad//_de yang rdo rje sems dpa' nyen//_rang snyems yul du 'dzin pa'i rgyu//_'khor ba'i sa bon ma rig pas//_rgyu rkyen byas nas sdug bsngal 'byung //_de phyir rang 'khrul rmongs pa'i sems//_gzung 'dzin bying rgod zhen pa'i cha//_yal la brten nas chags sdang skye//_'khor ba'i rgyu ni chags sdang gnyis//_gcig dang mi gcig rtsol ba'i bar//_'khor ba'i mtha' la zad pa med//_de phyir rang rig don rtogs nas//_sems med yul 'di ci la srid//_de bas rang sems snying po 'di//_sems kyi yul las 'das pa'i phyir//_gcig dang mi gcig brjod kyi bar//_ma rig blo la yul sems yod//_log lta can rnams dam par 'dzin//_de phyir sgra dang rtogs pas//_gol sgrib yul sems gzhi nas dag/_de phyir rang byung ye shes sba//_dus gsum bzo 'gyur med pa'i phyir//_'khrul med yang dag mngon sangs rgyas//_de phyir nges don rtogs pas chog/_rdzogs pa chen po des don 'dus pa las//_yul sems gzhi la skabs babadun pa'i 'u na bya bzlab ca pa //_danas 'dus pa brgyags rnams la//_gan ga semam cathal pa las//_rtswa 'dras thabs dkya shA sdul pa//_yang dgangs dang tung bal//_mang krung 'byung bsam pa da //_zla dang jam tha ra bya dang byung rig pa'i chos nyid ni//_dper na nor bu rin chen la//_dgos 'dod 'bras bu rdus gcig rdzogs//_de bzhin chos 'byung chu shing 'dra//_da yang 'dus pa'i snying po zhon//_bden don rtsib mdzor bsdus na//_tak+Sha ka yi rgyan bzhin du//_rgyu 'bras mthar phyin gzhi nas rdzogs//_de bzhin mos spu'i snying po la//_bde dag pa ye ting 'dzin gyis//_sgra ni gzugs brnyan phyag mtshan dang //_bzlas brjod ga dus tshigs kyis//_chu rkyen tshogs pa'i rus mthu yis//_rigs gsum dkyil 'khor lhar gsal kyang //_dngos grub gzhan la //_sems thal ting dzin kun naganas//_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_sems la sangs rgyas 'dod pa na//_mog gam bu dang gnyen byed bzhin//_sngang ba sems pan thong bang //_raganags byed pa 'dra//_de rdzogs 'di//_la ldan 'dus pa rnang yid la brlag cing bcang bar gyis//_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_nga yis bstan pa'i snying po 'di//_sangs rgyas kun gyi gsang ba'i chos//_rig 'dzin rnams kyi thugs la spros//_chos skyong rnams kyis gter ltar srungs//_de don man gi nges don 'a log sred zhen chags ma nges la//_nam yang bstan par ma byed cig/_nyan thos la sogs lta dman pa//_bstan kyang go bar mi 'gyur la//_mi theg khal chen bkral ba bzhin//_don mgo bas ngan song lhung //_da yang 'dres pa'i 'kho na de bas rang sems sngon spangs pa'i//_rnal 'byor dang ldan 'khor rnams la//_'chi ka'i snying po don mtshon nas//_nges don rgyud 'di rtogs par gyis//_de yang rdo rje sems dpa' nyon//_yang gsang nges don khyad par can//_'bras bu nges pa'i gdams 'di//_bla mar mi gros ngams can//_tshul 'chos byed cing slob dpon sdod//_nom phongs gzhog slong khagasags can//_g.yo sku'i thabs kyis chos 'dod la//_rgyud kyi snying po'i lta ba ni//_nam yang bstan par ma gsungs so//_ded 'dod rang bzod dris don chos//_gal te snying po'i don bstan na//_'phags pa rnams kyang dgrar ldang na//_mkha' 'gro ma can spros ci dgos//_rang gi srog bcad mnar med lhung //_nga yang 'dul pa'i snying po nyon//_nges don 'dus pa'i rgyud chen 'di//_shi ba'i 'od bzhin du//_bstan pa 'jig pa'i dus dag tu//_kun bzang thugs rje'i byin rlabs kyis//_rnal 'byor skal ldan rnams la 'gyur //_de tshe ris don 'bras bu 'di//_gu lang gi ser bzhin mi nub tsam//_snod ldan 'ga' la bstan pa las//_snang dgu rnams kyi thod snyagasas//_banas byes pa'i don la no//_dayang 'das pa'i spang ba/_shAgang panags ga nasas ces//_las kyangs ga gas pa gru cang /_smra gas ma/_nga /_da snying po 'di//_lung ldan rnams la gas par gyis//_de rtogs 'bras bu sangs rgyas 'byung //_'gro ba'i mgon pos/_de spyad gsungs//_de yang rdo rje sems dpa non//_gsang ba'i man gtud rtse di//_banag cig dus cing nga/_snad ldan kun la chos 'di 'thung //_de co theg dman sgro sgrar 'debs//_rang gis rang bskus 'khor bar lultung //_'di la mos shing 'dzin pa la//_sangs rgyas kun gyis byin gyis rlabs//_bsod nams mi bad gter dang ldan//_kye ma'i 'bras bdung /_'di'i'i byeng //_kun tu bzang pos de srid bzhed//_rdzogs pa chen po ma don 'das pa la sa/_gyung bskrad cing bzung bar bstan pa'i le'u ni brgyad rgyartsa gcig pa'o//_//_rdzogs brten pa ngas den 'das pa pa khrims cad kyi snying po na po ni rnam par gong ba zhes bya rdzogs sa//_rgya gar gyi mkhan po ba ma la me tha dang /_bo da nI mi n+na baM mAHr+tha dran pa mo rjes kyis bsgyur cing zhus ni gtan sal ba pa'o//_/_rgya gar ska dang/_ma hAs d+he rdzas swAr sgra la myod de n+tus/_bdag du/_rdzogs pa chen po bacha khor bca gcod kyi rgyad cis zab/_bcom ldan 'das dpa lar byung /_ba nyid ye shes kyi sgra dang ldad pa la thug 'tshal lo/_'di skad bdag gis gsungs pa'i dus gcig sa bcom ldan 'das 'og pid mig nas ni sra byang chub tu sbyi /_la bzhugs pas/_rdo rje sems dpa' la gzigs nas//_ye shes 'khor po'i dgongs pa las//_g.yas pa med par snyoms par zhugs//_de'i tshe ngas gsum sangs rgyas dang //_rdorje 'chang gi rig 'dzin dang //_dpal chen dzan 'thang ma mo'i chags//_gzhan yang lha mi la sogs pa//_ngang ba'i dad pas 'das pa rnams//_rang sems gdong nas dag pa'i phyir//_dang ba'i yid kyis yengs med par//_thabs cig rim par 'khod gyur to//_de nas thugs kyis gzigs pa'i don//_rdo rje sems dang pa d+he//_'khor rnams la ni brtser dgongs nas//_ting nge 'dzin gyis don gsol ba//_'jig rten mgron po rdzogs sangs rgyas//_ye shes thags rje chen po yis//_chos nyid gnas lugs ji lta ba//_mnor ma brjos snying po'i thugs//_'khrul ba gas pa'i thabs//_dus 'dir bdag la dang shad du gsol//_rang byung ngo bo nyid sku ste//_don lhan chos rjes bka' stsal pa//_sangs rgyas chos nyid ji lta ba//_'khor 'das ma rig snying po'i don//_yang mes ra yis don bshad du//_rgyud yang sems cing ldangs//_garnams mi sde brgyal zhir 'jug//_lha min 'jig non sbyin pa'i tshogs//_blo slong 'dagyes pa'i gang thag nams//_gtan du dkyil bachen por byed//_deng tshel bdag da dang //_'jigs pa sde rdzogs kyi nga //_la po spong du 'gas//_rig 'dzin rnams kyis spong bar 'gyur//_de ltar bka' stsa la khron go nas//_sems kyi gdung ba'i yus paton to//_'gal sems rdul tsam med pa ni//_dad pas byang chub don la mos//_nges tshig bstan par yid bsdus so//_tshong bo nyid sku des//_ye shes 'khor lo'i dgongs pa las//_thugs rjes mngon par gzigs nas kyang //_kun bzang chos su rtogs 'dod de//_don du bsdus pa bka' stsos pa//_legs so dad dka'//_mngon sum du yang mi gnas phyire//_srid gsum sems can thams cad ni/_bkreng dang don gyis 'dul ba las//_nges pa'i don gyis 'dul ba min//_nges pa'i don gyis 'dul ba ni//_u du ma wa ru'i me tog bzhin//_brgyal mA las ni des ga' zhig/_'byung srid kun dang thun mong min de khyer snod ldan 'phrang gyur na//_ma mtshon go dang ma dpyang rtogs//_don ldan dag tu rig pa'i blos//_ma bsgoms bstan pasangs par rdzog/_de yang rdo rje sems dpa' nyon//_bla ma rdo rje slob dpon la//_dad pa gyong la med pa dang //_meched la sring gdang ba dang //_'khor ba'i sdug bsngal 'joms pa'i phyir//_byang chub med ngamyale ba'i gnas su ltung //_rdzogs pa chen po rin po che 'khor brtsad nas gcod pa'i rgyud las/_don gyi gleng gizhi bstan pa'i le'u ste dang po'o//_/_sems dpa' chen po khyed nyon cig/_nga yi chos nyid gnas lugs ni dus gsum med pa'i gong rol du//_'khor 'das gnyis ka gdod nas med//_nga nyid de tshe gdod nas gnas//_bstan pa med pa'i ston pa'i thugs//_da rang nyid las ma gtogs pa//_sangs rgyas sems can ming yang med//_'byung ba lnga dang srid pa'ang med//_mi sred phung po gang las skyed//_bag chags ma bgos smos ci dgos//_don rtogs sangs rgyas mang pa'i phyir//_de bstan rtogs pa shar ba med//_de tid 'khor 'di ska la bskrad//_gzugs med sems kyi snying po la//_sgo lde med phyir yul yang med//_bza ngan nam tog gtid nas med//_nga nyid gcig pu sngon du byung //_rang gsangang nyid kun gyi mes//_rgyu rkyen med pa'i snying po yin//_da yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_nga yi mtshan nyid mthun dpeni//_dngos po med pas nam mkha' 'dre//_mi 'gyur srabs rdo rje 'dra//_skye ba med pas a dang 'dra//_don la yin gyi dpe mi bstan//_de phyi snying po'i thig le 'di//_chos nyid med pa'i ston rol du//_stong pa nyid las sA phyir//_nga la stong pa/_ltar ma te bsna//_gdags pa med pa'i sngon rol du//_ming dang tshig pas ro snga phyir//_yod cing rtag/_par sgro mi gdags//_ra ni dbyar med snying po la//_skye shi med par yid ches pas//_'khor 'das ma reg nga snga phyir//_reg gnyis log phyir gdod nas dag/_skyon gyis ma gos chos kyi skye//_kun bzang glo bar 'angs rab tu che mchog ye shes sku//_don gyi sangs rgyas rtogs pa'i phyir//_mi skye mi 'gag nam mkha' 'dra//_nga martogs pa'i sangs rgyas med//_de phyir sangs rgyas kun gyi mes//_sangs rgyas kun gyi bla mang //_de ma 'khrul pa'i sems can med//_sems can pha ma nga nyid yin//_nga las 'khrul ba'i rkyen gyis su//_sangs rgyas sems can nga las byung //_kyi yi 'byung ba nga yi rtsal//_nam mkha' stong pa nga yi dpe//_li nang mtshan ma nga 'khrul rtags//_'khor 'das rtsa bang nyid yin//_dus gsum sangs rgyas thams cad kyis//_nga la bshad cing mtshon mi mkhyen//_mdzad pa'i chos nyid smos ci dgos//_bskal bar 'byams kyang skye ba med//_shi med nor mchog kun gyi gzhi//_rang byung snying po kun la khyab//_don la 'gyur ba rdul tsam med//_gdod nas 'gyur med byang chub la//_ji skad brjod kyang mthun pa med//_de phyir blo yi spyod yul min//_mdzad spyod 'byung ba 'khor ba'i chos//_de la dam par gang 'dzin pa//_nam mkha' dag la 'dzin pa 'dra//_sangs rgyas rnams ni spyod mi mdzad//_mgyur ma skyes pa nyid yin//_rdzogs pa chen po rin po che 'khor brtsad gcod kyi rgyud las/_don chos nyid kyi gnas lugs bslad pa'i le'u ste gnyis 'khor 'khor ba'i chos//_thag sbrul bro yor je bzhin du//_ma rig pa las 'khrul pa brgyad//_dmus long lta bur rang bsgrubs pas//_mi shes log pa'i 'khor bar 'khyams//_de bas sems dpa' chen po nyon//_'og ma'i lung ldan rkyen phrad nas//_blos 'jal lta ba rnam pa bzhi//_yo ga man chad nga yi gtan//_je snyed mdzad kyi dang mi rnyed//_mtshan ma rags shing nga mi rtog//_rgyud lung rnal 'byor chen po 'thungs 'dod bzhin//_'khor 'das glo bur rkyen yin phyir//_ngo bo gnas lugs chos sku yin//_rdzogs pa chen po rin po che 'khor brtsad gcod kyi rgyud las/_de las 'khrul tshul bstan pa'i le'u ste gsum ma rtogs don mi btsal//_drug lnga mi srung chos nyid du//_de shes mi bsgom dgos pa med//_da yang 'dus pa'i 'khor rnams nyon//_'khor 'das gnyis kyi sgo sla /_mgos ngo bo nyid kyi sku//_chos rnams kun gyi gzhi yin phyir//_kyu yi ye shes de la b+ha//_rtogs pa'i rkyen gyis chos kyi sgra//_thams cad mkhyen pa'i rgyu yin phyir//_ma rtogs sems can thams cad kyang //_bla mA'i rkyen gyis ye shes 'byung dang bral ye shis gsal//_rgyang dngas rtog med dpe bzhin du//_chos su khamig rnab can//_'byung 'dug med phyir bsgom mi dges//_stong nyid cig tshad dus mnyam bur//_dran rig rgyu ba 'i byung yang //_gzhil med byer ma bsgoms kyang //_sems can dus na chos kyi sku//_rmi 'dogs ma tshod lus bsgoms pa//_dper na bum nang nam mkha' bzhin//_tshe gcig bsgoms kyang ye shes med//_rnal 'byor ma bsgoms bsgom pas//_dran rig chos nyid byang chub sems//_de nyid spyad pa'i yul las 'das//_de nyid don las nyams pa med//_rang sems byed//_rgod du ma gnas tshe//_nang gi dus bzhi don dran pas//_tshogs drug 'gags kyang chos skur gsal//_bum pa'i nang gi mar me 'dra//_'jigs pa brgal 'dod mi bzhin du//_nyams med rig pa'i don 'di las//_nad gcod sdug bsngal ci byung yang //_man ngag dran pa gces par gsung //_sangs rgyas sems can gnyis ka'i gong //_gsang ba'i dus gcig nyid du shes//_gol sa rdul tsam mi 'byung bas//_de tshe chos sku zang ka ma//_mi 'gyur brtan pas gser bzhin na//_de phyir skye ba'i rgyu med pas//_tha ma 'chi zhing 'pho ba med//_de ltar rig pa rdzun mi 'chad//_lus ngag yid gsum sku gsung thugs//_rdzogs pa chen po rin po che 'khor ba rtsad nas gcod pa'i rgyud las/_gdams ngag mngon du rgyan//_lus la pho mo yod pa'i phyir//_chags pa spyod tshe don gyis zin//_gsal jes chos su'i snying po nyid//_de tshe bde ba longs spyod rgyan//_gzhi pa 'ching grol med pa'i phyir//_dkar po'i chos dang sdig la sogs//_gnyis ka'i 'bras bu mi 'byung bas//_sems nyid ye nas rtogs pa yin//_de phyir dge sdig byed mkhan med//_gnyis ka skyes bu'i log rtogs tsam//_don la spyod spangs gnyis ka med//_de phyir zhe sdang yul mi dmigs//_'jig rten tshor ba bsal ba ni//_gti mug rmongs par ngas bshad pas//_rtogs nas mi 'byed dang 'di//_ci smad blta bar rab shes pas//_'dod yon lnga la ci spyod kyang //_bcing bar mi 'gyur grol bar 'gyur//_rdo rje sems dpa' da nyon cig/_chos 'di zos pas 'dzin rtog nub//_chung 'di go bas rtog pa'i//_'khor 'das 'phru rnab par dag/_spang sdang zhen pa rdul tsam dang du brlag/_nyes pa dag pas sgrib pa med//_gnyis su med pas shes rab gsal//_gzhi ni mi 'gyur gser bzhin du//_ye shes mi 'gyur brtan pa che//_de ltar rtogs pas ye shes nyid//_'bras bu gzhan das bce 'am gdong nas byung ba'i jo bo nyid//_'bras bu sul mi ltos pa//_lus dang bral ba kun bzang thugs//_gzhi gnas brag chags mi gos pas//_rnam lA mi g.yo ye shes sla//_rdzogs pa chen po rin po che 'khor med//_nga yi snang ba sna tshogs pa//_don la med phyir gzhig mi dgos//_spros kyang nga la bzlas kyang nga //_nga ye skra gsang thugs lnga ni//_'khor ba gdod nas med pa ste//_du yang rdo rje sems dpa' nyon//_khe nas gnas pa'i gzhi nyid ni//_chos kyi sku yi thugs su bstan//_de nyid rtags pa'i ye shes de//_chos kyi sku lo longs spang thugs//_dran rtog don du shes pa de//_chos kyi sku yi sprul pa'i thugs//_de nyid rtogs pa'i ye shes te//_don ldan gzugs kyi phung po 'di//_longs spyod rdzogs pa'i chos kyi sku//_dbang po ma 'gags gsal ba de//_long so sor rdzogs pa'i ljongs spyod smra//_bskul bskyod pan lag gang yin no//_longs spyod rdzogs pa'i sprul pa'i sgra//_don ldan tshig tu brnyed pa de//_sprul pa'i sbrul chos srang gi srung //_dngos med tshig tu gsal ba de//_sprul pa'i muM yi longs spyo gsung /_tshigal ba nas de dag pang //_sprul pa sgra la thugs yin gyi//_thugs kyi thigs te thugs parig/_mas stes pa ma//_gis gags gas ltam//_de yang seM pa dbang chenapa to//_/_ngol mu gsung rdugs nyid las/_gang yang med de ye nas gong //_de yi mdzad spyod ci skad pa//_rnam smin lus dang ma bral kyang //_pad+ma dang ni 'dam bzhin du//_nyes pa kun gyis gos pa med//_phyi ma'i mdzad sbed chen po yang //_rang sems rtogs pa'i rnal 'byor par//_'di ma yin phyi ma yi//_bar dor mngon sangs che ba nyid//_mngal gyi sgrib g.yogs med pa'i phyir//_kun tu bzang po gud na med//_thugs ni chos sgra nyid kyi thugs//_sgra ni ye shes chen po'i sku//_ye shes lus can thams cad mkhyen//_sangs sa kun dang mnyam las lhag/_de phyir gsang sngags 'bras bu che//_tshe gcig 'bras bu nges par 'byung //_de bas rang sems ye shes sku//_de yi yon tan brjod mi langs//_de nyid ston pa'i ye shes kyis//_gzugs med rig pa ye shes sangs cas rgyal brgyas pa sra//_yon tan thams cad mu ba tsa lardzogs//_gdul du mangs gzugs rnams 'byung //_daco sems narnams cad/_yad bzhin dbang po dag nga thad don//_dazung bdag pa nam mkha' la//_lus dang bral bas sgrib mi gos//_sprin dang /_bla rnangs 'byung me srid//_de ba'i ni rang sems 'khor//_dang ldan la sogs dkyil 'khor gyis//_rang sems lhag mthong mngon gyur nas//_dga' ba'i sems kyi li rang ste//_rang rang sems la gsal ba'i don//_ga pa brjod pa'i don mthun nas//_'dus pa'i 'khor rnal 'byor blos ci dgos//_de skar bka dul gsungs mthag/_'khor rnams mdag nga rdzogs te//_don la thathom pas //_ma na yi gyis sbyin d+hAm sa//_'do nagan dag par chagasas//_rgyam mom rin pasogs//_kun bya blan cing yang na gyur//_nanas dngas sa thugs kyis gzigs nas don rig pa//_'khor rnams zhe gnas pas pa gtan la//_zhen pa gas la bar yid gzigs nas//_ting nge 'dzin gyis don gsol pa//_'jig rten mkhas pa rdzogs sangs rgyas//_ye shes thugs rje chen po yis//_chos nyid gnas lpags ji sta ba//_ma nor ma bcos snying po'i thugs//_'bul ba'i blo yis rtogs pa'i thabs//_'khor 'das ma rig lhag mthong don//_dus 'dir bdag la bshad du gsol//_rang byung ngo bo nyid su des//_don rigazugs kyis bka' stsal pa//_sangs rgyas chos nyid ji lta ba//_'khor 'das ma rig snying po'i don//_yang mes nga yis don bshad du//_rdzogs chen skye med don zab kyang //_ma rtog pa la sdig mor che//_nor bu rin chen rnyed dka' bzhin//_phyi ma'i dus kyi mi ngan rnams//_dar drag dang thuzung tshor skyen la//_bka' yi don la yid mi ches//_gzhung mang sprin tshig rtog pa za//_byang chub pas ni khe grags bsgrub//_le lo che bas grub rtags rings//_'dug la brtson nas 'dor ba skyen//_des pa'i don lag la chen 'jug/_bden pa'i tshig la sgo sur 'debs//_tshig tu zhib la don tu cing //_thos bsam pas ni ngom par rings//_shes nas mi bslab lal bar 'dor//_gong 'og gzung ni bsres te bskrad//_bka' min mi chos don du byed//_man dag zab mo thor du 'tshong //_tshig nyung zab mo gting phyin la//_shazung mi phyed khrom zhes smra//_gdams ngag zlos chud mi gson par//_don nyid rtogs par byed pa la//_yid mi ches pa'i rigs pa la mang por bshad kyang don med la//_mekhas pa yin zhes yon tan brjod//_bla ma sprod pa'i gang zag la//_kho bden zer zheng rjes su 'jug/_gsang ba'i man ngag mgo bar//_sngo bus mabyas slob dpon 'khangs//_blangs nas brgyud pa'i man ngag la//_ma nor yin par mi bar//_rang ba zo 'a chabs 'bras pa la//_yid ches byed cing dam par 'don//_lta dman rnams kyi do sung byed//_da lta bu la dus byung ba//_don bstan srung cig nyid la//_rgyud lungs das rgyas smag cang dngangs//_nyan thos mdo rje bsngal cing 'bog/_zhwa dang la/_med du /_blo slar 'dogs pa'i gang zag rnams//_gtan du dmyal ba chen por byung //_'di'i tshe yi bar chad dang //_'dogs pa sna tshogs de la 'od //_mgo lus tshal pa stong du 'gas//_rig 'din rnam gyis spongs par 'gyur//_de rgyar shin tu gsang ba'i don//_snod ldan spong rnyed dkon//_de skad bka' stsal don go nas//_'khor rnams mgrin gcig thal sbyar nas//_yid kyis gdung ba'i don gsol pa//_'khor ba'i g.yang sar ltung ba la//_thugs rje chen pos mi 'dzin nam//_ri dwags 'dzin pa'i rgyar blud na//_rnam tog zab ma gcod dam/_can las la rdug tshad kyang //_'gro don snying rje mi mdzad dam//_ma rig mun pa'i smug dum ru//_dmus long bzhin du rang sems 'thibs//_ye shes nyi ma mi 'char ram//_zhe sdang me bzh-in//_dngos pa mdang sa nas mkhru' 'dra //_mi 'gyu sa pas don 'dra//_nga med pas ma dang 'dra//_don ma yin phyir dpe 'di bstan//_ngo bo nyid kyi lha mchog ni//_dngos po mtha' bral nyon mongs dag gi mtshan nyid kyang //_min pa tsam gyis mi spangs par//_yang dang /_don du mi bya'i phyir//_dgag bsgrub med patsam du bzhag/_mya ngan 'das pa'i chos kun kyang //_yin pa tsam gyis mi blang //_dbang po spyod bya lan du gzhug/_'theng gi rnal 'byung skam pa pos//_chos spyan ma mkhang la bral//_de bzhin pa yi ye shes de//_brjod med rgyun mi chad par sa//_gal te byung tshong rtag chad chos skar gsal ba la//_ji snyed pa yi nam grangs kun//_dgag bsgrub bya ba med pa'i phyir//_ye nas ma gra ba 'od gsal par//_rang gi sman ye nas gnas//_gzhan la bdag tu mgru ba phyir//_phyogs gnyis thal ba'i byang chub sems//_mtha' bzhi'i tha skad bral ba la//_'angal byed gtan tshigs ci zhig dgos//_de yang rdo rje sems dpa' nyon//_mtshon pa'i tha snyad me brjod do//_chos rnams ma lus thams cad kun//_log pa'i rjes su 'brang ba'i phyir//_yul med thog ler dang shar ba sa/_ji bzhin ma nor snying po yi//_nges par gzhan du blta las grol//_de yang rdo rje sems dpa' nyon//_kun bzang brdal khyab rang bzhin la//_bog mtha' tshod phyir golas med//_de yang ye shes rang shar bas//_golas nyid kyang nyid yin//_ye shes par gyur ba'i phyir//_dmigs rten med pas gol myed gsungs//_de yang 'khor gyi snying po nyon//_dpe zhagang gis mi nus kyang //_nam mkha' nyi shar rang gsal bzhin//_rang byung me ga sang po yang //_rang gi ye shes bde gsal bas//_snang bas med gnod med phyir//_phyogs kyi tha snyad bshad mi dgos//_rdo rje sems dpas yang gsol pa//_ma bsgoms don dang 'bral med pa'i//_de don rtogs thabs gang gis bste//_ma bsgoms grong du gyur pa yi//_rang gi tha snyad gang la gdags//_'don du med pa'i dper//_mtshan mabyung na cis mgos//_lta ba rang shar chen po la//_ma bsgoms golas ces mi 'gyur//_de skad klas pa'i drin gas nAnas//_'dus pa'i 'khor la bka' stsal ba//_snying po rang gi rtogs dang ni//_man ga dgongs pa thugs brtol nas//_shes rgyud rtogs pa'i bla ma yis//_ji bzhin nyid du shar ba la//_snang byed chos sgra nyid son pas//_mtshan ma'i dngos po mi 'byung phyir//_sman dang sman pa'i thabs bzhin du//_sems med mi 'dod ci zhig bral//_de yang 'dus pa'i sbyong banyan//_thun ma rgyam lus sub pa byud//_nga bzhi nying du rang ga pas//_gang yang ngan par mi sgrubs//_thams cad de bzhin dang sar gyu//_dephyir mdu'i la mi gnas pas//_gtang gzhag ming pa'i di dpe 'a na//_ma bani ma thong khyer par ga dpa de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_bsgom du med pa'i chos nyid la//_rnam rtog mtshan ma mi 'byung bas//_dmigs nas bsal ba bsgrub me bya//_dper na nam mkha' 'di nyid la//_sprin dang khu rangs la sogs ni//_ji snyed gzhin med pa ltar//_ji bzhin zhing du rang dran pas//_dus mnyam gsal bas yang dag te//_de la gtan pas btsas su med//_bskad rang gsal bcas par zad//_de yang 'das pa'i skang banyan//_yul mad theg la rang shar bas//_yang dag ngan lam 'jug kyang //_ngam nyid du gyur pas na/_don du gnyer ba gang yang med//_sra phyi gzhan du dngos med phyir//_ched du bskum du med pa ste//_dmigs pa gtad pa'i don dang bral//_don mi gnyer la dgra med 'dra//_de nas 'bus pas yang zhus pa//_gtung gzhag med pa'i bcom pa la//_mi 'byung gsungs pa ci//_rnal 'byor rtsol bral ma yengs na//_bya byed 'gog med gsungs pa ci//_de nyid 'ching bar mi 'gyur ba'i//_phyogs bral bstan pa ji ltar lags//_kun rig ston pas bshang du gsol//_'dus pa'i tshogs la bka' stsal pa/_dus gsum rnam pa thams cad du//_skye 'chi med par ye shar bas//_snang med zhen rtog thams cad kyang //_gang yang chos skur mgrub don shes phyir//_rang gsal yul la rtog pa med//_dag dang ma dag thams cad kun//_gang yang dgag bsgrub med pa'i phyir//_gzhag dang byung bar med don//_'byung 'jug med pas bsgom mi dgos//_rtsol ba med phyir spyod pa'i mchog/_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_bdag gzhan ka nas ma grub phyir//_bya byed ma lus thams cad kun//_'gro drug las kyang bder gshegs mdzad//_ci spyod chos slar ye shar bas//_gang yang mtshan nyid dbyer med de//_byed pa nyid na grol bar nges//_blang dang dor ba dang gis med//_de yis 'ching bar ci la 'gyur//_rdzogs pa chen po don 'dus rang byung bde ba'i 'khor lo'i rgyud las/_rdo rje sems dpa'i thugs pa dag pa'i nyams kyang bye ba 'dzin//_yang gdus dunag ga pa tu//_man ma btsas byud pa bshad//_rnam ba dam gas pag+sa//_gsalal man/_gamag sunga'o//_dag la dang ban//_mad dang sa ga yul ba 'das skyon dang ga las sgo dgra ste//_chos srid sdom TI ga yin//_de ya sems dpa' nyin/_byung sa lkugs pa pa li//_rje rang ga ye shes yin//_dz+has nI ga rnam shes gangal//_dkying 'dod pa'i yo dun pa/_@ mar me 'dra//_tshad ni shes pa ma bsgribs pa//_nges tshig gdams ngag ma brjod gsal//_yul ni snang ba chos kyi dbyings//_'bras bu longs spyod rdzogs pa'i sgra//_skyon ni dbang po yan drags pas//_golas bying tshugs 'gog pa yin//_de ya 'dus pa'i 'khor nyon cig/_gang la rnam par mi rtog pa'i//_ngo bo snga phyi ma dran pa//_rtsal ni bde la mi rtog pa//_yul ni 'dzin med ma 'gags pa//_dpe ni b+ha ba btang ba 'dra//_nges tshig yul la ma yengs pa//_tshad ni dran med ma gying ba'o//_'bras bu sbrul sku thub drug 'byung //_skyon ni goms par ma byas pa//_go las rgya mtsho'i gting dang 'dra//_nges tshig mnyam nyid rkyen mi tshugs//_gsal dang mi rtog dus mnyam tshad//_'bras bu rang byung chos skur rtogs//_skyon ni the tshom yid ma ches//_go las log rtog mi g.yo gsum//_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_de dag rtsa ba mdor bsdus na//_yid la chos sku khral gyis dran//_de nyid dang la cog gis zhog/_yul la 'dzin med rtog pa sangs//_rang rig yid ches gdeng 'bras bu bstan pa'i le'u ste nyer dgu pa'o//_/_rdo rje sems dpas yang zhus pa//_kun rig ston pas bdag la gson//_rnal 'byor nyams su myong ba'i bka'//_don dang mthun par bshad du gsol//_de skad zhus pa'i don dgongs nas//_'dus pa'i 'khor la bka' stsal pa//_nyams myong rim pa rnam bzhi ste//_sdang ba chos dbyings nyams myong dang //_rang rgyud zil gnon nyams rtsong dang //_des lung spyod pa'i nyams myong dang //_sna bgadong nan nyams cing //_da yang dong sems dang 'atan//_rlung bcos dbyings nyas sa rjo na//_b+hab btung bya ma 'dra te//_mthong srung gzugs phral sogs pa//_gang mthor ldan cang dang yang //_btab/_dpung ma nadu rgyan tsam//_yul ni bran ne long 'dug kyang //_spong spad zhen par ma song na//_chos dbyings gdeng ldan nyams kyi mchog/_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po tsun//_rang kyad nyon mongs pil non rtags//_bsgo ma thabs skyon dang brdzes pa'i thabs/_thun tshwad nyams dang rnam lnga ste//_bsgom thabs lte bu'i kun la bsgom//_skyon ni bying dang rgod pa ste//_bcos thabs rab 'bring thu ma yis//_dz+nyAn tshad nyams kyi tsho dadang skar//_de don nges par la brgyan//_gser 'gyur rtsi yis thebs pa bzhin//_rtog dang mi tog thams cad du//_rlung sems lta ba'i chos nyi dwa gsal//_rang bya zil gyis non pa'i nyams//_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_dedon mthar byug rim pa don//_gos kyi 'jam rtsub sna tshogs dang /_zas kyir mchog gang myong ba//_glang d+ha na mthing bral chos srar shes//_de tsam nyid na ye shes shang//_yul nyid ma yin gang dran pa//_chos srung shes pas yul dang bral//_de tsam yul dang rig pa gnyis//_gnas skapas mthar thug 'bye/_pa med//_de yang 'dras pa'i snying po skyon//_rtog pa mngon gyur gdeng gi nyams//_yo goms pa brtan pa ni//_cig cung rim gyis 'thung ba ni//_shes rab blo mi khyad par las//_lus ngag yid kyi nya mas rtags kun//_rnal 'tshang/_pa la ngas par 'byung //_de nyid rna la 'byor nyams kyi mazlog/_dad nga tha ma ma nasaslong gi chud pas/_rnal rtsor nyams su myong ba'i bag rjegs san pa'i leng kyi sa mtha pa'o//_/_des 'dus pa'i tshigs rnams pa//_sman ga rton pas yang su /_par bags //_zham la nan rna ma byas non//_dang /_'dags pas+ho//_gas pa nag dang sa nas da//_ga sungs sa rgyas snang pa //_dayang sa //_spyod pa//_rgyal po gtan ma zin pa bzhin//_lus nang thos kyi stan du gnas//_dbyer mi 'bral gzungs dang lhan//_ngag gi brjod che //_dbye ni dgra pa'i bcwa la zhugs paskyen//_nges pa'i don gyis sngon bral bas//_ngag tu mang rnod mos sbeng gas la//_seM lo spyod pa ni//_nags kyi de dgas pag phubs bzhin//_shes rab rnam gas/_ma thag rjod pas//_lhag mthong rig pa'i gang ngags na//_chos kyi de la dmigs pan//_no d+he gas ni thub pa bzhin//_ga ldan rnams kyi gas thub pas//_dam dang ma thab ba//_kun tu babang po yishes slong ga rgya las//_ban la dmigs pa'i snong pa btsun pa'i man ma ga pas/_da yang ngas pa'i nga na//_da seM na//_da pa gdus kyis ba gsu pa bzhin/_dpral med chos slar shrIs//_snang bas mi gnod pan ma nus//_nang ge slo drogs gcod pa ni//_mi shi spang la mi lcog bzhin//_mtha' bral des pa'i gdeng gas paH//_rang rig bden mthong byer mi myog/_gaN+DI pa kan-i sgo 'dogs chod skrod pa//_gtid mad 'dugs pa zug pa bzhin//_ma rig sangs phyir yul dang thal//_de phy-ir yid ches gded zhes zi na//_lung gi blo na nas khyod spod na//_nor stor sma la rnyed pa bzhin//_dza don mad rgya sun partan nas//_ngas don nyid pas chos skur rtogs//_kun tu bzang pa ye shes kyang gaspyang las//_blo 'dogs tshod pa'i spyod pa brtan pa'i 'ong sas gnyis pa na/_popas dpas yang ltung /_dugapatsun tsun gan byer//_mi zhes rdzong babatsun drug sor//_ngan ga rten pas thugs gsol//_'du /_'bar la bka' phral ba//_zas rtog pa gzhom pa'i phyir//_khyi phrag bzhin dru gcang dum med//_nan pan rtog pa bcas gyuran//_yon tan drug ldan spyod pa'i mchog/_gas kyi thug pa bcom pa'i phyir//_snron pa bzhin drung na dgugan//_gtan na/_tan ldan bI//_chags med yon tan mchog tu wAn//_gzhan gyi rtog pa gzhom pa'i phyir//_nga tsa med par thugs ston dang //_gnyen la ldang ba byas sngar na//_'khor ngan bdang bsnom par ba 'phel//_dam mi rtog pa gzhim pa'i phyir//_braM ga na 'khor ba bzhin//_chags sdang gzhol med par zhes//_dgra nyid chos srung shes par bya//_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_dringadag spyod pa gang snod dang //_rigs spyod kun dbya ba ni//_bram ze da ma chog 'gal ba'i phyir//_lung ldan kun gyis rbA rung //_kun tu bzang po ye shes klong gi rgyud las/_rtog pa gzhom pa'i spyod pa bstan pa'i le'u ste so gsum pa'o//_kun rig ston pas yang gsungs pa//_gzhi shes blo dngos gcig pa dang //_btul zhugs mchog dang bgegs med pa'o//_ye shes rang ga rangs bshad kyis//_'dus pa'i 'khor rnams yid kyis nyon//_lung ldan gdams dgag zhi shes pas//_ngo ba nyid lagro ldan phyir//_gang yang chos sbyar rang gas la bsdu//_'dus mabyas pa'i rnam mkha' 'dra//_blod ngos gcig par shes pa yis//_mthong nyid 'khrul med shes phyir//_snang mthong gang dran chos spar shes//_smig rgyu nam mkhar shes pa 'dra//_brtul zhugs mchog gi spyod pa ni//_mtshams med lnga dang mi dge bcu//_chags sdang lnga la longs spyad kyang //_lta ba rtogs pa'i grangs su 'khru/_lung rigs mi 'gal rgyud gnas dang //_'bol zhing zhi la 'jam 'dod pas//_nges pa'i gdams ngag mgon//_ma khas kyang rmongs pa sbyor ro rje//_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_bgegs med ye shes dang shar ba//_rang gi rnam rtog yod kyi bar//_bgags/_gyi mthab la zad pa med//_dngos su med byer 'khrul pa'i blo//_mu stegs can la 'dra yod phyir//_'drer 'dzin skye ba ma rig pa//_mo ma'i rdzun gyis glen pa bslus//_dam pa kun gyis 'ang phun bton//_yul dgrolas rjod bur na//_bdu ma ngag sa sbyar shes//_gzhi la lha 'di med rtogs pas//_phanAg nor bya ba ming yang med//_de yang 'dus pa'i snying po nyon//_de dag ye shes rang shar ba//_kun brtags zad na 'dre rnams stongs//_'dri ni nyid 'khrul yin pa'i phyir//_ri bong ral yod rtog 'dra//_rdzogs pa chen po ngas don thams cad 'dus pa'i yang snying kun tu bzang po mi shes slong gi d+h+yang /_rin po che gser gyi yang zhun las/_ye shes rang shan gyi spyod pa bstan pa'i le'u ste so bzhi pa'o//_/_de nas 'dus pa'i tshogs rnams la//_kun rig ston pas yang gsungs pa//_dam tshig srung med ngas bshan smra bsal mi na 'dra//_bsrung ba'i dam tshig lnga nyams na//_marungs las rnams spyad pa'i phyir//_ma rig mun pa ma sol pas//_rang gi mig ni rang bton 'dra//_srang ba'i dam tshig bzhi nya mas na//_'og ma'i sems babyed sbom zhig pas//_khan mtho rnam gsum srung //_brtson rang chung pa'i med na 'dra//_de yang 'dras pa'i snying po ton//_de dag dmigs kyis dbye bani//_ltung ba'i sgo gur lhung nges skyes//_de yi sdug bsngal smos thag chad//_las kyis tshe tshod brjod mi langs//_kun tu bzang po ye shes klong gi khyad las/_matogs pa'i dmadzong //_nyams pa'i ltung ba'i sgong stan pa'i le'u te so lngapa'o//_de nas kun rig rgyal po las//_mthar drug ye shis 'bras bu sogs//_'dus pa'i 'khor gyi don med du//_mngon par sangs rgyas bka' stsal ba//_lus med ye shes sgo lnga yis//_thar ma mthong ba'i ni mnas gas rdzun rdzog/_sa gas/_na ma/_ngas pa dun pa pa pa lag sa s+ho//_rgyabasapa ma pa'i sa zang/_na ba /_da dgongs pag bye//_bcol med 'gro don ta bye//_de yang rdo rjesams dpa 'aton//_rnam sri phus me ye shes bu//_rig pa gsal la ba mig can//_skur ma mthing ba'i mi srid byengs la//_zhing rnams sangs kyis shes slong //_chos bla dad pa thar rang sems rtogs pas thos sbar shar//_ting 'dzin nas ni nyams su bsten//_ngos cog nyams rtsong chos spang shes//_de la bsgom pasla bya mi dgos//_'khor 'das gnyis sum bsams pa'i//_lhag mthong dran pa'i ye shes la//_maM brjed gzungs ldan rig pa'i sgra//_gangang rang reg sum khyab phyir//_dus gsum sde 'gag med pa yi//_'bras zla bar do ye shes ldan//_ma rig pag chags shes pa'i phyir//_rkyen bzhis bskyed pa'i dbang mi 'gyur//_phyir chibs la dres par 'gro//_ldan grub mngon kyar dus der 'grub//_sangs rgyas kun dang mnyam pa'i sa ye shes rang shing don rtogs pas//_rang byung chos sul mig rgyan//_ye shes sgo lnga gsal bar 'dus//_theg gzhanas ngas gas 'dod pa ni/_blos byas rnam gsum des don med//_datsor yang nyisangs rgyas kyi//_'bras zla bar do sangs rgyas rba//_kun tu bzang ba yi slong ba rgyad las/_dzis don gyi sangs kyis bstan pa'i len k+shi sa drug pa'o//_/_den bston pakun gis//_'as pa'i khor 'donag nga //_de ma ni dus pa'i yang byung 'di//_sangs nas kun gyis gsungs pa'i tsha//_reg dzin rnams kyis thugs la rdzas/_myong kun gyis gtur ltar bsrung //_mkha' 'gro rnams kyis mig ltar nam//_de byer rgyud 'di shin tu gzhan//_de don man ngag rjes don 'di//_log snyed chags zhen ma nges la//_nAm yang bstan par ma gsungs so//_de yang rdo rje sems dpa' nyon//_yang dag des don kyad bar can//_'bras bu mngon 'byung nges pa 'di//_sno ngan rnams lam gsang na//_tshe thung sdug bsngal nad 'byung zhing //_phyi mthar medang myal bar lhung //_de phyir mi bstan snod ngan ni//_bla mar mi gus dargyal can//_tshul 'chos byed cing slob dpon spod//_dpral ba med par gdams dga' bka' chun byas nas yod tshul ston//_don mgo bas chos la sdang //_dpe rkun byas pas phyi thag thung //_'gran sems bcug pas mched dang mkhon//_gnas lugs ma shes rang mthong che//_nga rang mkhas zhes bla ma smod//_sngon nas yod zer rdzun du sba//_gzhan nas rnyed zer thabs kyis tshol//_phyi nas dbul zhes slob dpon byed//_chos rjes bya zhes thabs kyis bslu//_g.yo skye skyon gyis chos 'tshol la//_nam yang bstan par mi bya'o//_de yang 'khor gyi snying po nyon//_gal te 'khor gyis chos bstan na//_phyi nang chos skyong kun khros nas//_mnyes kha yigs sna tshogs 'ong //_byas pa med par mi rnams sngar/_ser snas bsags pa'i rdzas rnams brlag/_rang nyid skyo 'bog sgur por 'gro//_rgyal 'god chags nas gnas mi rnyed//_phyi mar dmyal ba chen por ltung //_de phyir shin tu gsang bar bya//_de tshe des don yang snying 'di//_gu lang gser bzhin mi nub tsam//_snod ldan 'ga' la bstan pa las//_snang dgra kun gyi yul min//_'khor rnams nges pa de ltar zhog/_kun tu bzang po ye shes klong gi rgyud las//_rgyud gtad pa'i le'u ste so bdun pa'o//_rgya gar gyi mkhan po bi ma la mi tra dang /_bod kyi lo b+ho ba A tsan+ya dran pa ye shes kyis bsgyur cing nus te gtan la phab pa rtogs so//_rdzogs pa chen po des don 'dus pa'i yang snying kun du bzang ye shes grong gi rgyud rin po che gser kyi yang nun zhes bya ba/_shang pa cha chung ba ye shes rgyal mtshan gyi thugs dan/_bla ma gtan chung ba la gnang ga gtan chung bas 'brom zhang 'bang la gan ga /_je bdun nar 'bar gyis//_skye skom la gnang ba/_skye rgom gyis/_khyer pan 'od de la gnang ba'o//
